name: Snack Empire Holdings Limited
summary: Snack Empire Holdings Limited, a food and beverage company, engages in the wholesale and retail of food and beverages. The company provides Taiwanese snacks and beverages under the Shihlin Taiwan Street Snacks brand. It operates approximately 248 outlets and restaurants in Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, and the United States. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Singapore.
